## Checklist

- [ ] `python -m pytest backend/tests -q` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally (if `frontend/` changed)
- [ ] `ruff check backend` reviewed (if `backend/` changed) — lint is advisory in CI, not blocking
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, personal paths/IPs, or other sensitive data added
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or setup steps changed
